productDisplayName: Vishudh Women Printed Turquoise Blue Kurta
description: "Inactivated on 11th Apr,2012, mail by Vishwanath Gopalkrishnan because of  "As a part of the annual stock correction we need to send 1890 pcs from vishudh back to the brand" Composition Turquoise blue printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a boat neck, light blue broad tape along the neckline, at the bust and sleeve hems with stitch detailing, and imposing multi-coloured print above the vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Inspired by traditional Indian print and crafted in classic cuts, this kurta from vishudh makes for a fab addition to your ethno-modern wardrobe. The imposing print makes a perfect contrast to the subtle print of the body and light blue tape detailing. Team it with jeans, leggings or loose pyjamas and heeled slippers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
